generation.sheet: requested 1x3, model returned 3x3 (3 variant rows per emblem) on solid #FF00FF, raw 1408x768

processing.note: model over-delivered a 3x3 variant grid; components are grouped into 3 columns (helmet / tiger / horse) and the middle variant row is picked per column
steps: chroma key magenta via generate2dsprite.py remove_bg_magenta (threshold 100, edge 150)
connected-component detection (alpha>8): 9 components, grouped by x into 3 columns, middle row picked
per-component crop +6px pad, shared scale to fit 128*0.92, center paste
defringe pass 1: r>g+40 && b>g+40 -> clamp r<=g+45, b<=g+25
defringe pass 2 (bronze rule): b>g+8 && r>g+8 -> clamp b<=g-4
QC: 0 magenta-residual pixels on all 3 cells

icon_semantics.crest-1: war helmet with plume (formation slot 1, blue chip)
icon_semantics.crest-3: horse head (formation slot 3 / scout, green chip)

intended_use: world-map home bottom-left squad quick panel row crests (CanvasFrameRenderer.renderMapHomeSquadPanel), tinted chips come from UiThemeTokens.palette.squadChipBlue/Red/Green
